headline: GM, UAW face sudden high-stakes factory rift
summary: General Motors (GM) has installed new collaborative robots—known as “cobots”—at its Detroit-Hamtramck Factory Zero plant to modernize production, but the move comes at the same facility where it has already laid off 1,000 workers. GM claims the cobots will improve worker ergonomics, but ...

headline: General Motors (GM) Shares Key Software Update to Enable Power Transmition
summary: General Motors Co. (NYSE:GM) is one of the 10 best electric and autonomous driving stocks to buy according to hedge funds. On June 9, General Motors Co. (NYSE:GM) announced a software update enabling certain U.S. electric vehicle owners to transmit power back to the electric grid. This expands the existing vehicle-to-home system, which already allows […]
